calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: J. Murphy, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Sampson D. Williams and Brenda Williams.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Dismissal on file of Does 1-10.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $33,300.28
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,452.50
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $595.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $32,347.78
Judgment signed in open court.
